topic: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While)

questions.hindi: मैं चाय और कॉफी दोनों पीता हूँ।
questions.english: I drink both tea and coffee.

questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I drink both tea and coffee."
